briefdescription.para: eFUSE User Red key 1 clear mask
eFUSE User Red key 0 clear mask
PUF Red expanded keys clear mask.
Combined mask to clear KUP key and expanded (zeroize) key simultaneously.
< Enable client printfs by setting XSECURE_DEBUG to 1
Used for selecting the Key source of AES Core.
NIST P-192 curve value in Ecdsa.h.
NIST P-256 curve value in Ecdsa.h.
NIST P-256 curve value in Ecdsa.h.
NIST P-384 curve value in Ecdsa.h.
NIST P-521 curve value in Ecdsa.h.
NIST P-192 curve value in Ecdsa.h.
NIST P-224 curve value in Ecdsa.h.
NIST P-256 curve value in Ecdsa.h.
NIST P-384 curve value in Ecdsa.h.
NIST P-521 curve value in Ecdsa.h.
This lookup table array defines properties of Key sources.
This function configures SSS to AES engine.
Macro to typecast XILSECURE API ID.
Mask for API ID in Secure IPI command.
Xilsecure KAT major error for client APIs.
Mask used to validate that IPI parameter structure size is 8-byte aligned.
This macro is for backward compatibility.

detaileddescription.para: For ECC Prime curves, use XSECURE_ECC_PRIME

briefdescription.para: Alias for XSecure_EccCrvClass enum for backward compatibility.
IPI response buffer indices for algorithm info query.

detaileddescription.para: Response buffer index for algorithm version

briefdescription.para: Response buffer index for NIST compliance status.
IPI response buffer indices for algorithm info query.

detaileddescription.para: Response buffer index for algorithm version

briefdescription.para: Response buffer index for NIST compliance status.
IPI response buffer indices for algorithm info query.

detaileddescription.para: Response buffer index for algorithm version

briefdescription.para: Response buffer index for NIST compliance status.
RTCA register to extract RSA key pair readiness.
RTCA bits [7:6] mask for RSA key status.
